name: mini-istio-monorepo
description: Root package to run all Mini-Istio services

scripts.install:all: cd control-plane && npm install && cd ../watcher && npm install && cd ../service-a && npm install && cd ../service-b && npm install && cd ../sidecar && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.service-a: cd service-a && set "PORT=3001" && set "SIDECAR_URL=http://localhost:4001" && npm start
scripts.sidecar-a: cd sidecar && set "PORT=4001" && set "APP_PORT=3001" && set "SERVICE_NAME=service-a" && set "CONTROL_PLANE_URL=http://localhost:5000" && npm start
scripts.sidecar-b: cd sidecar && set "PORT=4002" && set "APP_PORT=3002" && set "SERVICE_NAME=service-b" && set "CONTROL_PLANE_URL=http://localhost:5000" && npm start
